/usr/bin/c++   -DBRPC_WITH_GLOG=0 -DGFLAGS_NS=google -DBTHREAD_USE_FAST_PTHREAD_MUTEX -D__const__=__unused__ -D_GNU_SOURCE -DUSE_SYMBOLIZE -DNO_TCMALLOC -D__STDC_FORMAT_MACROS -D__STDC_LIMIT_MACROS -D__STDC_CONSTANT_MACROS -DBRAFT_REVISION=\"1600208\" -D__STRICT_ANSI__ -g -O2 -pipe -Wall -W -fPIC -fstrict-aliasing -Wno-invalid-offsetof -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-reserved-user-defined-literal -fno-omit-frame-pointer -DNDEBUG -O2 -D__const__=__unused__ -pipe -W -Wall -Wno-unused-parameter -fPIC -fno-omit-frame-pointer -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -Wl,-U,__Z13GetStackTracePPvii -Wl,-U,_ProfilerStart -Wl,-U,_ProfilerStop -Wl,-U,_mallctl -Wl,-U,_malloc_stats_print CMakeFiles/braft_cli.dir/braft_cli.cpp.o -o output/bin/braft_cli   -L/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib ../output/lib/libbraft.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libbrpc.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgflags.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libprotobuf.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libleveldb.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.1/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.1/lib/libcrypto.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.1/lib/libcrypto.dylib -ldl -lz -lpthread -framework CoreFoundation -framework CoreGraphics -framework CoreData -framework CoreText -framework Security -framework Foundation -Wl,-U,_MallocExtension_ReleaseFreeMemory -Wl,-U,_ProfilerStart -Wl,-U,_ProfilerStop
